mission.title: kuberay: [Bug] GKE CSI Fuse Mounts prevent worker pod creation
mission.description: [Bug] GKE CSI Fuse Mounts prevent worker pod creation. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify kuberay troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kuberay deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay -n kuberay --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review kuberay configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kuberay configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay
kubectl get configmap -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kuberay
```
### Search before asking

- [X] I searched the [issues](https://github.com/ray-project/kuberay/issues) and found no similar issues.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug] GKE CSI Fuse Mounts prevent worker pod creation
steps.description:
## Why are these changes needed?

Adding FAQs to assist Users with Troubleshooting.

## Related issue number
```yaml
Error: context deadline exceeded
  Warning  Failed     12s                  kubelet            Error: failed to reserve container name "wait-gcs-ready_search...7fb_0": name "wait-gcs-ready_search...7fb_0" is reserved for "df8...d3a"
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug] GKE CSI Fuse Mounts prevent worker pod… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay -n kuberay --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kuberay --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## Why are these changes needed?

Adding FAQs to assist Users with Troubleshooting.

## Related issue number
codeSnippets:
Error: context deadline exceeded
  Warning  Failed     12s                  kubelet            Error: failed to reserve container name "wait-gcs-ready_search...7fb_0": name "wait-gcs-ready_search...7fb_0" is reserved for "df8...d3a"

apiVersion: ray.io/v1alpha1
kind: RayCluster
metadata:
  name: fuserepro
spec:
  rayVersion: '2.4.0'
  headGroupSpec:
    serviceType: ClusterIP
    rayStartParams:
      dashboard-host: '0.0.0.0'
      block: 'true'
    template:
      metadata:
        labels: {}
      spec:
        containers:
        - name: ray-head
          image: rayproject/ray:2.4.0
          ports:
          - containerPort: 6379
            name: gcs
          - containerPort: 8265
            name: dashboard
          - containerPort: 10001
            name: client
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["/bin/sh","-c","ray stop"]
          volumeMounts:
            - mountPath: /tmp/ray
              name: ray-logs
          resources:
            limits:

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kuberay installed or the issue environment reproducible.
